title: Delhi Pain Management Centre - India's First Dedicated Pain Hospital
heading: India’s Most Advanced Non-Surgical Pain Treatment Services
description: DPMC provides the most advanced non-surgical pain treatment services for all types of chronic pain. Call : 9999123444
text:
Delhi Pain Management Centre - India's First Dedicated Pain Hospital 9999-123-444 contact@painhospital.in 9999123444 Book Appointment Skip to content Delhi Pain Management Centre Home About Us Open menu About DPMC Our Doctors Pain Management Open menu What causes pain? What is Pain Management? Conditions Open menu Back Pain Knee Pain Joint Pain Arthritis Pain Neck Pain Sciatic Pain or Sciatica Slipped Disc Migraine Cancer Pain Sports Injuries Treatments Open menu Injections Ozone Discectomy Ozone Injections Platelet Rich Plasma Therapy(PRP) Radiofrequency Ablation Vertebroplasty For Doctors Open menu Short-Term Fellowships 4-Months Fellowship Contact Us Open menu Centers Appointments Online Video Appointment Ask A Pain Query International Patients Leading Pain Management Care Trusted by 2,50,000 patients over 18 years. Wide-ranging treatments, from medications to advanced procedures. Know More → Patient-Centered Approach Tailored treatments for individual patient needs. Ongoing support for improved quality of life. Know More → State-of-the-Art Facilities Latest technology for accurate pain diagnosis and treatment. Modern clinics designed for comfort and accessibility. Know More → About India’s Most Advanced Non-Surgical Pain Treatment Services Trusted by over 2,50,000 patients, Delhi Pain Management Centre is the pioneer in providing non-surgical pain treatment services in India. Treatment for all major chronic pain conditions like back pain, slipped disc, sciatic pain, knee pain, joint pains, arthritis, neuralgic pain, headaches and migraines is provided using the latest and most advanced treatment modalities like ozone discectomy, radiofrequency lesioning, Platelet Rich Plasma (PRP) therapy, spinal cord stimulator implant, and vertebroplasty. 4 fully equipped state-of-the-art facilities South Delhi – Safdarjung Enclave West Delhi – Rajouri Garden Gurgaon – Sector 51 Ghaziabad – Indirapuram Book Appointment → Book a Clinic Appointment Book Now Book an Online Video Appointment Book Now Meet Our Doctors Dr. Dhruv Bibra MBBS, DA, DNB, FIPP (USA), EDPM (Belgium), FPM (Germany) 20 years of experience in pain management Trained on pain management in USA, Germany and Hungary Expert in non-surgical regenerative treatments Dr. (Prof) G.P.Dureja MBBS, MD, FIASP (USA) 40 years of experience in pain management Started pain clinic at AIIMS, New Delhi Expert in back pain and joint pain treatments Our Services Pain Conditions Treated Patient Testimonials Success Stories My experience. Just meeting and speaking to Dr Bibra half of your problem is gone. You are positive about getting recovered. I felt very optimistic during my visit two months ago for the first time. Second time when my friend Bupesh Nagarkoti got his recovery. DS Srinivasan Dr Dhruv Bibra is a wonderful doctor who listens to his patient’s problem with great patience and calm. It is very difficult to find such doctors in this busy world. Mehul Garg The experience with the doctor is very good. He is very polite and tries to understand the problem and suggest relevant medication accordingly. Will surely recommend the doctor to others. The appointment with the doctor started well on time and the doctor listened to every small pain that is there in the body. He doesn’t try to give extra medicine only the medicines that are relevant. Minakshi Sharma Wonderful Experience !! Great Doctor. Gives a patient listening and guides and advises very nicely. Debarun Kalita I really appreciate the Communication skills, efforts and knowledge of doctor. He had answered all my query and suggested me some lifestyle changes. overall highly commended. Ashish Bithar Excellent. The first time that any doctor has understood what i am going through which is an essential starting point. The interaction has helped me manage my condition better and more importantly with a more positive outlook to the whole situation. SHEFALI KHANNA It was very satisfying. He gave me a detailed examination, assessed the pain, listened to the history of the back problems, and advised very safe pain medication for my late stage pregnancy. And the effect was almost immediate. By the time I took my second dosage at night, I could feel a significant reduction in pain. Thanks a lot! Gargi Bhattacharya The Visit was extremely productive. Dr Dureja gave us a very patient hearing My mother who had been in pain for nearly two years forgot all about it. Dr Dureja was gentle and patient far beyond our expectations. I would recommend him to all my friends and relatives who are needlessly suffering pain. PRAMILA I was suffering from back ache from 1 month, consultated with many doctors, but no result finally came to know about Dr. Dureja… Bingo… My back ache is gone now. He listens everything and the suggestions and medicines done wonders to me. Only one thing, which I noticed that it is better to go early as doctor see patient on basis of first come first serve. Manoj Tiwari See all Testimonials Media Coverage News & Blog Understanding And Avoiding Heel Pain Understanding And Avoiding Heel Pain Heel pain is a common foot condition. It is usually felt as an intense pain when using the affected heel.

It has served patients suffering from a range of conditions including back pain, knee pain, joint pains, arthritis, headache and migraines, cancer pain, cerebral palsy, fibromyalgia, shoulder pain, ankle pain, heel pain, facial pain, trigeminal neuralgia, and herpes pain among others.
